title: Fishy's Astromech Wolves
description: If you rename a wolf to "R2", You get an R2 unit! (and other types of astromechs)
body:
Rename Your wolf to turn it into an astromech unit!

R2:

![The Ideal Male Physique](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/be0b1ef5f197dd190a7d895b84b46be1bb87bccb.png)

BB:

![BB-8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/feedd178c0f06a197c5690191fe58da2443c0a9f.png)

R3:

![Look at that brain!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/190af6599b6eb1c5d73fa06f852be69e12f42fc4.png)

C1:

![He's old. He gets away with being grumpy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/6eec36626c2fc2aa965cd0a2a4d647af89a8d168.png)

R5:

![Keep an eye on him, he has a bad motivator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/d96443a08d36aaefb6e9cf81cf1f2a18903bef94.png)

GONK(pig, not wolf):

![He's OP af](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/120b5fc9a9143f389e6dd647e3e6c0c04acaa60e.png)

Protocol Droid (Villager):

![Speaks too many languages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/c380463f21642c0137b484f50653e840d14dd2f0.png)

**Must have ETF, EMF and ESF installed:**

https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

https://modrinth.com/mod/esf

Any name with "r2", "bb", "R2", "C1" or "R5" in it will work.

The wolf variant defines what base colors your astromech will have. You can change the accent color by dying the droid unit.

Here are a few examples (2 of each variant):
![R2 examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/cb3adf9dfae0b9ace2c13973dda9539e133e14ec.png)
![BB units](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/a7a96b2e3f4e2087f0afcde7ff916e86189b8f94.png)
![R3 examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/a5f00d6dab01430851d6a77eb99537d34c479823.png)
![C1 examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/8b8c86d98e009eed1ca4e8edea320e9f412b063d.png)
![R5 examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/7ecef29eb9e71891b85d24bfb5073d4b5dda6f4d.png)

Here are the Villager Protocol droids:

![Protocol Droid Examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v7JCoqjN/images/6ec9ec578d4ff1a85504f1cf49f5893944f3620c.png)


Specific Character names (will work no matter what type of wolf or collar color)

-"R2-D2" or "Arturito"
-"BB-8"
-"C1-10P" or "Chopper"
-"R5-D4"


[![Affiliate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a4883838950998d67143440012948c2410ff03.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3131)
